creator: yamagi@yamagi.org
text:
Created attachment 206219
Update x11/tint to version 16.7

Hi,
the attached SVN patch updates x11/tint to version 16.7. It's a minor bugfix release with next to no noteable changes, the only one is a blinking battery indicator when running out of power.

The patch was tested with Poudriere and I've run for about 24h withe the updated version on my desktop.
